8/usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/paramiko/win_pageant.py
_get_pageant_window_object.
    Check to see if there is a "Pageant" agent we can talk to.
    This checks both if we have the required libraries (win32all or ctypes)
    and if there is a Pageant currently running.
    )

_query_pageantO
PageantConnectiona
    Mock "connection" to an agent which roughly approximates the behavior of
    a unix local-domain socket (as used by Agent).  Requests are sent to the
    pageant daemon via special Windows magick, and responses are buffered back
    for subsequent reads.
    c
	_response
selfr
__init__}
